text: American Express Company operates through three primary segments: Global Consumer Services Group, Global Commercial Services, and Global Merchant and Network Services, providing charge and credit payment card products and travel-related services worldwide. The company generates revenue from payment and financing products, network services, accounts payable expense management, and travel and lifestyle services, serving consumers, small businesses, mid-sized companies, and large corporations through multiple channels including mobile applications, direct mail, and in-house sales teams. As of the most recent filing period, American Express reported Q3 2025 revenue of $10.415B with a net margin of 27.86%, demonstrating the profitability of its closed-loop business model.
